source: Android KvtxScriptUtilsTest; iOS currently returns nil for the same malformed script

expected.commonDecision: shared common KVTX parsing should fail malformed WRITE_BYTES payloads with a typed malformed-script parse error. iOS nil-on-truncation compatibility should remain in an adapter only if required.

notes: Android currently throws when WRITE_BYTES declares a three-byte payload but only one byte remains.
